fix_summary: Changed knowledge base search from prefix-only matching to substring/contains matching across topic, title, and content by switching the SQLAlchemy pattern from `query.strip()%` to `%query.strip()%` while preserving the existing result shape and ordering.
approval_reasons: The implementation directly addresses the reported bug in the identified service method.
The search predicate now uses wildcard-wrapped `ilike`, so terms appearing anywhere in topic/title/content are matched.
Existing prefix matches still work because prefix strings are still a substring of the broader pattern.
Automated tests passed (3/3), which is the source of truth for readiness.
